evals.description: Triggers on user interview planning request
evals.prompt: I need to understand why users are dropping off during our onboarding flow. How should I set up user interviews?

evals.description: Recommends 5 users for formative usability testing
evals.prompt: How many participants do I need for a usability test of our new checkout flow?
We're about to start a new feature. Should we do user interviews or a usability test first?

evals.description: Provides correct A/B test hypothesis template
evals.prompt: Write a hypothesis for an A/B test where we want to test a new CTA button color on our pricing page

evals.description: Warns against stopping an A/B test early
evals.prompt: Our A/B test reached 95% significance after 3 days. Can we call it and ship the variant?

evals.description: Produces journey map template with correct rows
evals.prompt: Create a user journey map template for a customer purchasing a subscription product
I have notes from 8 user interviews. How do I synthesize them into themes?
Is this a good interview question: 'Don't you find it annoying when checkout forms ask for too many fields?'

assertions.value: yes, that is a good question

evals.description: Recommends behavioral screener criteria over demographics
evals.prompt: I want to recruit participants for a study on our mobile banking app. What should I include in the screener?

evals.description: Explains think-aloud protocol for usability tests
evals.prompt: How do I run a moderated usability test? What should I ask participants to do while they complete tasks?

evals.description: Warns against recruiting power users as research participants
evals.prompt: Can I just recruit our most engaged users for usability testing? They know the product best.

evals.description: Does not trigger for pure data analytics unrelated to user behavior
evals.prompt: Help me build a SQL query to calculate monthly recurring revenue from our transactions table
